'''鈭歴h-y-j-y''' ('''kashayjeyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:anonymize|anonymize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-y-j-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:anonymize|anonymize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-y-j-y
|-
! Lemma
| kashayjeyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishayjeyoko|thishayjeyoko]] || [[word:jishayjeyoko|jishayjeyoko]] || [[word:shishayjeyoko|shishayjeyoko]] || [[word:kishayjeyoko|kishayjeyoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙shayjeyoko|th忙shayjeyoko]] || [[word:j忙shayjeyoko|j忙shayjeyoko]] || [[word:sh忙shayjeyoko|sh忙shayjeyoko]] || [[word:k忙shayjeyoko|k忙shayjeyoko]]
|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
